# 2026-06-28 AI-compounders — rotate out defensives, add cheap international

## NARRATIVE

Markets pulled back all week — S&P and Nasdaq fell as US-Iran tensions (Strait of Hormuz risk)
met stretched valuations. The BIS warned that AI "exuberance" risks a prolonged bust if enterprise
ROI disappoints. For 1–3 years: stay in profitable AI compounders at fair multiples, rotate out of
zero-growth defensives, add cheap international while the dollar weakens.

## BUY

| Asset | Action | Why |
|-------|--------|-----|
| META | Add | PEG 0.8, earnings +62%, revenue +33% — cheapest Mag7 by far |
| ADBE | Add | FPE 7.4, PEG 0.55 — quality AI software deeply discounted |
| AVGO | Add | FPE 18.8, PEG 0.66 — custom AI silicon + VMware cash flows |
| ORCL | Add | FPE 13.6, PEG 0.84, revenue +20% — AI cloud underpinning |
| GOOG | Hold/add | Revenue +22%, earnings +82%, FPE 23 — AI optionality underpriced |
| VXUS | Add | PE 17 vs VOO PE 26 — 30% valuation discount + weakening dollar tailwind |
| VWO | Add | PE 16.5 — EM deeply discounted; China recovery + dollar weakness catalyst |

## DROP

| Asset | Action | Why |
|-------|--------|-----|
| NKE | Sell | Revenue flat, earnings –34%, PE 26 — losing share to On/Lululemon |
| CMCSA | Sell | Cord-cutting is terminal; earnings –32%; no recovery path |
| CAG | Sell | Revenue –1%, zero growth, tax loss harvest |
| GIS | Sell | Revenue +2%, earnings –14%, no catalyst |
| KHC | Sell | Revenue flat, brand decay, no repricing |
| LYFT | Sell | Uber dominates structurally; no edge |
| ARE | Sell | Life science REIT under leasing pressure; thesis broken |
| COUR | Sell | EdTech structurally commoditizing post-COVID |
| VSNT | Sell | Tiny noise position, losing |

## WATCH (buy on condition)

| Asset | Condition | Why |
|-------|-----------|-----|
| MSFT | Pullback to FPE ~17 (~$395) | Good company, currently fairly valued — better entry exists |
| PYPL | Two consecutive quarters of positive earnings growth | PE 8.3 is cheap but trend still negative |
| SOFI | 10–15% pullback | FPE 22, revenue +42%, fintech rate-cut beneficiary |
| QCOM | Revenue growth turns positive | FPE 17, PEG 0.6 — very cheap but cyclically weak now |

## DATA PROVENANCE

- Fundamentals: yfinance via fundamentals.py screener
- News: WSJ/FT feed scripts + web_fetch
- Date: 2026-06-28
